Global middleware in source order; per-route chains reference declared names.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- shared/mw.go --
package shared

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http:middleware
func RequestID(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http:middleware name=auth
func RequireAuth(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http:middleware name=audit
func Audit(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http:middleware name=nocache
func NoCache(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http GET /
func Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /account middleware=nocache
func Account(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http POST /admin middleware=auth,audit
func Admin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http POST /spaced middleware="auth, audit"
func Spaced(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/shared"
	"app/web"
)

func run() (err error) {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	defer func() {
		if errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) && ctx.Err() != nil {
			err = nil
		}
	}()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	// Providers
	r := router.New()

	// Middleware
	r.Use(shared.RequestID)

	// Register
	r.Method("GET", "/", web.Index)
	r.Method("GET", "/account", web.Account, web.NoCache)
	r.Method("POST", "/admin", web.Admin, shared.RequireAuth, shared.Audit)
	r.Method("POST", "/spaced", web.Spaced, shared.RequireAuth, shared.Audit)

	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() { errc <- HTTPServer(ctx, r) }()
	var result error
	for range 1 {
		if e := <-errc; e != nil && !errors.Is(e, context.Canceled) && result == nil {
			result = e
			cancel()
		}
	}
	return result
}

func HTTPServer(ctx context.Context, r *router.Router) error {
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr}
	srv.Handler = r
	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() {
		if srv.TLSConfig != nil {
			errc <- srv.ListenAndServeTLS("", "")
		} else {
			errc <- srv.ListenAndServe()
		}
	}()
	select {
	case err := <-errc:
		if errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
			return nil
		}
		return err
	case <-ctx.Done():
	}
	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	return srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
}
